caption: A man in a black hoodie with "BOSS TALK" printed on the chest, a white baseball cap, and headphones speaks while gesturing with his arm in a studio setting. He is seated behind a microphone, and a sign behind him reads "Where BOSSES Talk!". The room is decorated with framed photos on the wall. The scene then shifts to another man wearing a green t-shirt with the text "ION NEVER HAD SHIT" and a green baseball cap, also wearing headphones and sitting behind a microphone. In the background, a white mannequin wears a white t-shirt, and racks of clothing are visible. A logo featuring a microphone and the text "BOSS TALK" appears in the bottom left corner, and a red logo stating "BOSS TALK OUT FOR" is in the bottom right. The final frames remain static on the man in the green t-shirt as he listens.
